novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Didn’t resign over the eunuchs. Indeed he was known as “Stink of Copper” for paying bribe/fine for high office.

full_text:
Cui Lie (Weikao) 崔烈 (威考)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cui Lie (崔烈), styledWeikao (威考), was born in Anping/Boling. Scolded Dong Zhuo for being tardy. Killed by Li Jue and Guo Si’s troops. Cui Lie was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Cui Lie lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
